## Summary
A short description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this address?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2

- [ ] `server/`
